tasks.label: Home Assistant: Start
args: if command -v docker-compose >/dev/null 2>&1; then docker-compose up -d; else docker compose up -d; fi

tasks.label: Home Assistant: Stop
args: if command -v docker-compose >/dev/null 2>&1; then docker-compose down; else docker compose down; fi

tasks.label: Home Assistant: Restart
args: if command -v docker-compose >/dev/null 2>&1; then docker-compose restart; else docker compose restart; fi

tasks.label: Home Assistant: Logs
args: if command -v docker-compose >/dev/null 2>&1; then docker-compose logs -f homeassistant; else docker compose logs -f homeassistant; fi
